<!--
  Thanks for the PR. Keep the description short and concrete — the diff
  shows the *what*, this section is for the *why*.
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1–3 sentences. What changed and why? -->

Closes #

## Type of change

<!-- Check the box that fits best. -->

- [ ] `feat` — new user-visible capability
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — internal restructure, no behavior change
- [ ] `chore` / `build` / `ci` — dependencies, tooling, pipeline
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `perf` — measurable performance improvement

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this works? At minimum: -->

- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] `cargo check` (and where applicable `cargo build --features updater`) passes locally
- [ ] Manual walkthrough in `npm run tauri:dev` exercised the affected path
- [ ] For UI changes: screenshot or short clip attached below
